_comment: Default quota limits used by compute-quota.sh. Copied to ~/.claude-dual/quota-limits.json by install.sh on first install. Tune these to your actual plan.

ollama._note: Ollama Cloud paid tier: ~2000 req/day × 7 = 14000/week. Free tier is lower — set to 1200 if unsure.

anthropic._note: Claude Max 20x tier: ~4500 Opus messages rolling 7 days. Claude Max 5x is ~1500. Adjust per your subscription.
